ascendancy.author: EmergentMind (https://github.com/emergentmind/ascendancy-scheme)
ascendancy.description:
The Ascendancy colour scheme aims to provide a comfortable spectrum of
background and foreground shades complimented by soft but regal colours. The
palette has a small bias towards golden colours without creating a sense of
washed out overexposure.
ascendancy.name: Ascendancy

chinoiserie.author: Di Wang (https://cs.cmu.edu/~diw3)
chinoiserie.description: A variant of Tomorrow scheme from https://github.com/stonebuddha/base16-chinoiserie-scheme
chinoiserie.name: Chinoiserie

digital-rain.description: A base16 theme inspired by The Matrix, 90s aesthetics and retro terminals.
